title: Dada Devs mission
content: Dada Devs creates pathways for African female engineers to transition into Bitcoin and open-source development through code, collaboration, and contribution.

title: Mastering Bitcoin Dada Devs Track
content: The Mastering Bitcoin Track is the foundational program. It helps participants build technical understanding of the Bitcoin protocol and contribute to the open-source ecosystem.

title: Who can apply
content: The program is designed for African women with a background in programming such as Python, Rust, or JavaScript, and for software engineers who want to transition into Bitcoin development.

title: Prior Bitcoin experience
content: Prior Bitcoin experience is not required, but programming knowledge is expected.

title: Program structure
content: The foundational Bitcoin track is structured as an 8-week progressive course covering cryptographic foundations, transactions, consensus, networking, scripting, security, scaling, and open-source workflow.

title: Why join Dada Devs
content: Participants gain hands-on training, mentorship from experienced developers, real-world project experience, community support, and access to career or grant opportunities.

title: How to get involved
content: People can get involved by applying as a student, becoming a mentor, or partnering with Dada Devs to create more opportunities for African women in Bitcoin and open-source development.

title: Contact and partner inquiries
content: General and partnership inquiries can be sent to info@dadadevs.com.

title: How Dada Devs builds
content: Dada Devs focuses on engineering activation, ecosystem collaborations, open-source contribution, and a talent network that connects skilled engineers to protocol teams and open-source initiatives.

title: Dada Hub
content: Dada Hub is presented as Africa's first physical Bitcoin developer space based in Kenya. It is intended for learning, collaboration, and community building.

title: Next tracks coming soon
content: Upcoming tracks mentioned by Dada Devs include Mastering Lightning, Advanced Security Practices, and Applied GitHub Collaboration.

title: Why Dada Devs exists
content: Dada Devs exists to increase women's participation in Bitcoin development and help African builders contribute to protocol-level and open-source work that reflects local realities.
